description: On January 20, 2026, while posting a list of President Trump’s 365 wins in his 1st year of the 47th Presidency, the White House emphasized on X, “The winning will continue.” Officially launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — The Winning Will Continue (WINNING), as a political-themed memecoin, brings global holders and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, and permanent meme culture spreading onchain.
name: The Winning Will Continue
